basic_details.job_title: HNBGU Project Assistant Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: Hemvati Nandan Bahuguna Garhwal University (HNBGU) Recruitment 2026: Hemvati Nandan Bahuguna Garhwal University has released the official notification for 1 Project Assistant posts, inviting applications from eligible candidates. This recruitment provides an excellent opportunity for candidates seeking research jobs.

age_limit.details: Please refer to the official notification for age limit details.

qualification.education_qualification: Postgraduate degree in Physics from a recognised University or Equivalent
qualification.details: Project Assistant: Postgraduate degree in Physics from a recognised University or Equivalent.

salary_details.pay_scale: Rs. 27000/- per month plus HRA as per institute norm
salary_details.details: Rs. 27000/- per month plus HRA as per institute norm

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for HNBGU Project Assistant Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 23-05-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Project Assistant position at HNBGU?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email for the Project Assistant post at Hemvati Nandan Bahuguna Garhwal University is 23rd May 2026.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Project Assistant role?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a Postgraduate degree in Physics from a recognised University or an equivalent qualification to be eligible for the Project Assistant position.

faq.question: Q3. How will shortlisted candidates be notified?
faq.answer: Shortlisted candidates will be communicated through email by 25th May 2026. Ensure your email address is correctly provided in your application.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Project Assistant post?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a monthly salary of Rs. 27,000/- plus HRA as per the institute's norms.

faq.question: Q5. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: Applications are to be submitted via email. Interested candidates need to send their application form and CV in a single PDF file.

faq.question: Q6. What is the advertisement number for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The advertisement number for this recruitment is 2026/PHY/PMECRG/02.

faq.question: Q7. What is the total number of vacancies for the Project Assistant post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the Project Assistant position at Hemvati Nandan Bahuguna Garhwal University.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for the Project Assistant role?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Project Assistant position will involve an online interview.

faq.question: Q9. Where is Hemvati Nandan Bahuguna Garhwal University located?
faq.answer: Hemvati Nandan Bahuguna Garhwal University is located in Srinagar (Garhwal), Uttarakhand, with the pincode 246174.

faq.question: Q10. What should be the subject line of the email when applying?
faq.answer: The subject line of the email must be "Application form for ANRF-PMECRG-2026".
